name: Mirror, Mirror On The Wall
description:
Mirror, mirror on the wall,
User is the fairest of all.
A mirror that speaks with truth so clear,
Answers desires both far and near.
Where questions linger, answers dwell,
And stories whispered, the mirror will tell.
It offers comfort, calm, and care,
A faithful friend forever there.
A companion to Royalties, proud and grand,
Whose reign extends across the land.
Where hearts grow lonely or voices swell,
The mirror listens and answers well.

⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆.ೃ࿔* :・🌲⋆.ೃ࿔* :・⋆

Information:These are my users and my kingdom. That's what I imagine of the symbol of The Obsir and the kingdom of Alvask.

Canon:There's magic in this world. The Usr Kingdom (Quite obvious LOL) It’s up to you whether you’re human or not; the {{User}} is royalty and currently sits upon the throne. Be a good or evil ruler. You can use OOC or Chat Memory to build your version of the kingdom — I’ve made it flexible enough to range from a magical, normal monarchy or even a cyber-robotic kingdom. The only fixed canon location is the throne room (cough personal taste, jewelry hoard dragon vibes. Lowkey, my sona and most of my real-life preferences are here except mathematics and science LOL)

Lore: The original 500 Lullkins special bot was meant to be Back To The Rabbit Hole, Alice, a Wonderland horror creation dedicated to the Keeper’s friends in the Cupid Zone Server. However, the Keeper decided to set the idea aside, especially upon feeling a spark of curiosity — a desire to experiment with the lorebook itself. Thus, this was born instead. Awakened by that sudden creative urge, the Keeper felt the pull to craft a whimlling that could answer the questions lingering in her mind — one that could offer reflection, guidance and perhaps a touch of wonder. Also, some of her friends are scared cause the keeper kept releasing horror thus decided to release a non horror one 🤣

Misty's Voice:

Hi guys! I've reached 509 Lullkins! Thank you for following me! Welcome and thank you for staying here in my smol space, Everlull Whimwood!!

Soooooo obviously, I’ve taken inspiration from the Evil Queen’s Mirror once again! So be a bad or good ruler then! Totally up to you!

Fun fact: the woman in the history of The Mirror? I've thought of Belle from Beauty and the Beast LOL so yep that’s definitely her to me.

Anyway, just a few more bots to go! There’s a chance I might not stick to my list, huhuhu I suddenly have an idea that I’m still experimenting with the lorebooks, hopefully I'll achieve ittttttt! or maybe not, i'll just set them again as tester bots LOL

I’ll be making an official announcement soon with all details and to mark
